notes: Primary fermentation vessel. Fitted with KegLand HDPE tap, KL01625 grommet (EPDM assumed), KL01595 airlock.
One per fermenter. Filled with ChemiPro DES at working dilution.
Primary ABNS sanitiser. 1.5 mL/L working dilution.
Primary DES sanitiser. Used for airlock fill, tap spot sanitisation, and surface wipe.
